jsonLd.title: Shiprocket is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Shiprocket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!
